Home / Lore / Locations / Midtown Manhattan

location

Midtown Manhattan

The central operating area Division Agents are activated to secure against the Rikers, Cleaners and Last Man Battalion.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Original Division deployment

Midtown Manhattan is the core crisis area of the original activation, where SHD supports the effort to restore security against three organized hostile factions. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    After Green Poison, SHD Agents are activated to help secure Midtown Manhattan. [1]

  2. confirmed

    The Rikers, Cleaners and Last Man Battalion are the three violent factions named in that mission. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: District and landmark records will be separated after a first-game location inventory.
